notable_excerpts: We have won our largest ever deal with a global agribusiness leader as part of their vendor consolidation strategy. We have been selected to implement an AI driven model for application management, infrastructure support and cybersecurity services, including SAP S/4HANA, ServiceNow, and Microsoft Azure Platform, with a strong focus on efficiency and simplification.
Our HR and talent acquisition team have integrated AI throughout the talent lifecycle, enhancing employee experience and productivity.
LTIMindtree was honoured with 'Diversity in Security Award' at the 2025 Microsoft Security Excellence Award, emphasizing our dedication to promoting inclusive security teams.
The Fit for Future program has been instrumental in re-baselining our cost and improving agility.
Adding to the momentum, NextEra, our strategic joint venture in Saudi Arabia with Aramco Digital became fully operational this quarter.

chain_of_thought: The transcript reveals a strong focus on social and governance aspects, with significant initiatives in employee experience and diversity. Governance is emphasized through strategic partnerships and cost management programs. Environmental aspects are less prominent, with limited mentions of AI-driven efficiency.
strengths: Strong focus on employee experience and diversity
Effective cost management and strategic partnerships
